testnet.notes: Republished 2026-06-02 with the security-hardened contracts: payment_receipt::pay is the only way to mint a Receipt/PaymentMade (moves the funds itself; authentic amount + Clock timestamp; soulbound receipt), loyalty::earn consumes a hot-potato PaymentProof (no forge/replay), spending_vault::withdraw clamps to redeemable, mock_lender bounds apy_bps + guards accrued. Lender keeps principal (1:1) separate from an admin-funded yield_reserve, so redeem never aborts. Fund the buffer via mock_lender::fund_yield (AdminCap-gated). Supersedes 0x2e7adfe1... (pre-hardening) and 0xc7073f8c... (commingled reserve).
